meta.query: (all:"document parsing" OR all:"document understanding" OR all:"optical character recognition" OR all:OCR OR all:"layout analysis" OR all:"document layout analysis" OR all:"text recognition" OR all:"table recognition" OR all:"form understanding" OR all:"document intelligence" OR all:"page understanding" OR all:"scene text recognition" OR all:"handwritten text recognition" OR all:"information extraction") AND (cat:cs.CV OR cat:cs.AI OR cat:cs.CL OR cat:eess.IV)

synthesis.executive_summary: 今日研究聚焦于文档布局分析的语义化升级（数据快照提取）和多模态推理与识别任务中的OCR/文本特征应用。主要发现包括：开源布局模型在机构文档上泛化差，需从通用布局分析转向语义解析；视频推理中OCR压缩可加速训练但需权衡信息损失；多模态性别歧视识别中OCR文本特征和LLM语义线索有效，但特征维度敏感。
synthesis.trend_summary: 从通用文档布局分析向语义化、面向下游任务（如数据快照提取）的细粒度解析发展；OCR技术从孤立文本提取向多模态任务中的压缩、特征增强等辅助角色演变。
common_innovations: 定义新任务'数据快照提取'，强调从文档中提取语义上有意义的分析工件。
在视频推理中引入OCR压缩技术，将长链式思维序列压缩至单一画布以提升训练效率。
在多模态性别歧视识别中利用OCR文本特征和LLM衍生语义线索增强检测能力。
future_directions: 发展面向机构文档的鲁棒特征表示，区分分析性与非分析性内容，提升数据快照提取的准确性。
探索复合分析工件的分割与重组策略，解决当前模型碎片化问题。
优化OCR压缩策略，在信息保留与训练效率间寻找最佳平衡点。
减少多模态链式思维数据对人工标注的依赖，利用弱监督或自监督方法自动生成。
研究跨模态特征选择方法，降低高维特征对模型泛化性的负面影响。
engineering_takeaways: 评估开源布局检测模型时，需构建特定领域（如机构文档）的基准数据集，并采用空间提取质量指标超越常规检测性能。
OCR压缩技术可直接复用于其他长序列任务（如视频描述、文档级推理），但需监控细粒度信息丢失。
在多模态系统中，OCR文本特征与LLM语义指标结合可有效提升有害内容检测性能，但需谨慎处理特征维度与跨模态噪声。

watchlist.title: Benchmarking Open-Source Layout Detection Models for Data Snapshot Extraction from Institutional Documents
watchlist.watch_reason: 提出了数据快照提取这一新任务，并建立了基准数据集和评估框架，对推动文档分析从布局向语义化升级有重要参考价值。

watchlist.title: VTI-CoT: Visual-Textual Interleaved Chain of Thought for Video Reasoning
watchlist.watch_reason: OCR压缩技术在多模态推理中展示了提升训练效率的潜力，可追踪其在文档分析或长文档推理中的应用。

watchlist.title: Multimodal Sexism Identification and Characterization using Large Language Models and Gradient Boosting
watchlist.watch_reason: 系统对比了OCR文本、LLM语义线索等特征在多模态检测中的作用，为类似任务提供了可落地的工程方案。

papers.title: Benchmarking Open-Source Layout Detection Models for Data Snapshot Extraction from Institutional Documents
papers.summary: Institutional documents contain substantial amounts of operational and analytical information embedded within figures and tables. Current approaches for extracting visual content from documents are largely built around generic document layout analysis, where figures and tables are treated as uniformly relevant document objects rather than semantically meaningful analytical artifacts. In this work, we introduce a benchmark dataset and evaluation framework for \textit{data snapshot extraction}, the task of identifying and localizing semantically meaningful visual artifacts within institutional documents. The benchmark spans humanitarian reports, World Bank policy research working papers, and project appraisal documents, and includes annotations for figures and tables that contain reusable analytical information. Using this dataset, we benchmarked multiple open-source layout detection models and evaluated both detection performance and spatial extraction quality. Our results show that current models struggle to generalize to operational institutional documents despite strong performance on conventional academic benchmarks. Common failure modes include confusion between analytical and non-analytical content, fragmentation of composite analytical artifacts, and incomplete extraction of contextual information required for interpretation. These findings highlight a persistent gap between generic document layout analysis and operationally useful data snapshot extraction. We release the source PDFs, annotation dataset, metadata, and source code to support future research in operational document intelligence. The dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/ai4data/data-snapshot and the source code is available at https://github.com/worldbank/ai4data/tree/main/experimental/data-snapshot.
papers.zh_summary: 机构文档中嵌入大量操作与分析的图表信息。当前方法多基于通用文档布局分析，将图表视为均匀对象而非语义上有意义的分析工件。本文提出了数据快照提取的基准数据集与评估框架，涵盖人道主义报告、世界银行政策研究等工作论文，并标注了包含可复用分析信息的图表。使用该数据集对多个开源布局检测模型进行了基准测试，发现当前模型在运营性机构文档上泛化能力差，常见失败模式包括分析与非分析内容混淆、复合分析工件碎片化、上下文信息提取不完整。这表明通用文档布局分析与操作有用的数据快照提取之间仍存在差距。
papers.novelty: 首次聚焦于'数据快照提取'这一特定任务，区别于通用文档布局分析，并构建了针对机构文档的基准数据集与评估框架。
innovation_points: 定义新任务'数据快照提取'，强调语义上有意义的分析工件识别与定位
构建涵盖人道主义报告、世界银行政策论文等机构文档的基准数据集
提出空间提取质量评估方法，超越常规检测性能指标
papers.limitations: 当前开源布局检测模型在机构文档上泛化能力不足，对复合分析工件和上下文信息提取效果差。
improvement_directions: 设计更鲁棒的特征表示以区分分析性与非分析性内容
发展对复合分析工件的分割与重组策略
增强模型对上下文信息的捕捉能力
papers.engineering_value: 为自动化提取机构文档中可复用的图表数据提供了评估基准和失败模式分析，有助于文档分析系统的工程优化。
papers.why_relevant: 该工作直接关注OCR下游任务——从文档中提取分析性图表数据，对文档智能处理具有实际意义。

papers.title: VTI-CoT: Visual-Textual Interleaved Chain of Thought for Video Reasoning
papers.summary: Video reasoning aims to understand complex temporal events and causal relationships within videos. Recently, Chain-of-Thought (CoT) has been introduced to this field to enhance reasoning accuracy. However, existing CoT-based video reasoning methods primarily rely on text-only information for logical deduction, overlooking critical visual information during the inference process. Inspired by the human cognitive mechanism of reviewing visual segments during inference, we propose VTI-CoT, a Visual-Textual Interleaved CoT framework. VTI-CoT integrates textual reasoning steps with corresponding visual frames. Given the scarcity of visual-textual interleaved CoT in existing datasets, we develop an automated annotation pipeline to construct high-quality multimodal CoT data. Further, reasoning over long-form videos entails increasingly long CoT token sequences, which severely hinders training convergence and efficiency. To address this, we employ Optical Character Recognition (OCR)-based compression techniques to compress CoT supervision signals into a single canvas. Experimental results demonstrate that VTI-CoT achieves state-of-the-art performance among models of the same parameter scale while significantly improving training efficiency.
papers.zh_summary: 视频推理旨在理解复杂时间事件与因果关系。现有基于Chain-of-Thought（CoT）的视频推理方法主要依赖纯文本逻辑推理，忽略了推理过程中的关键视觉信息。受人类认知机制启发，提出VTI-CoT框架，将文本推理步骤与对应视觉帧交错结合。为解决现有数据集中此类交错CoT数据稀缺问题，开发了自动标注管道以构建高质量多模态CoT数据。针对长视频中CoT令牌序列过长导致训练收敛慢的问题，采用OCR压缩技术将CoT监督信号压缩至单一画布。实验表明，在同等参数规模模型上达到SOTA，并显著提升训练效率。
papers.novelty: 提出视觉-文本交错推理链框架，在推理过程中显式引入视觉帧，并通过OCR压缩解决长序列训练效率问题。
innovation_points: 提出VTI-CoT框架，实现文本推理步骤与对应视觉帧的交错融合
开发自动化标注管道，构建高质量多模态CoT数据
引入OCR压缩技术，将长CoT序列压缩至单一画布以加速训练
papers.limitations: OCR压缩可能丢失原始序列中的细粒度信息；框架依赖高质量的多模态CoT数据标注。
improvement_directions: 探索更优的压缩策略以平衡信息保留与训练效率
拓展至更复杂的时空推理场景
减少对标注数据的依赖，如采用弱监督或自监督方法
papers.engineering_value: 为视频推理系统提供了一种兼顾性能与训练效率的实用框架，OCR压缩策略可直接用于其他长序列任务。
papers.why_relevant: OCR技术在本文中作为压缩长CoT序列的关键手段，展示了OCR在视频推理领域的创新应用。

papers.title: Multimodal Sexism Identification and Characterization using Large Language Models and Gradient Boosting
papers.summary: We present the AILS-NTUA submission to the EXIST 2026 Lab at CLEF, addressing multimodal sexism identification and characterization in memes (Task 2) and short-form videos (Task 3). Our system follows a feature-engineered late-fusion pipeline built around gradient-boosted regression models and hierarchical post-processing. For memes, we combine visual, textual, demographic, biometric, and LLM-derived semantic indicators designed to capture high-level cues such as stereotyping, objectification, irony, and misogyny. For videos, we investigate the effect of feature selection, frame-based visual representations, OCR-based textual features, acoustic descriptors, and sensor-derived metadata. Development results show that focused LLM-derived semantic cues improve meme sexism identification, while video performance is highly sensitive to feature dimensionality and cross-modal noise. For videos, development results favor compact feature selection, but official test results show that this conclusion does not fully transfer to unseen data, where the unfiltered representation generalizes better. Overall, our findings highlight the usefulness of targeted semantic feature engineering for static memes and the need for more robust temporal modeling in noisy short-form video settings.
papers.zh_summary: 本文提交了面向CLEF EXIST 2026 Lab的多模态性别歧视识别与表征系统，处理模因（任务2）和短视频（任务3）。系统采用特征工程后期融合流水线，基于梯度提升回归模型和层次化后处理。对于模因，融合了视觉、文本、人口统计、生物特征和LLM衍生的语义指标，以捕捉刻板印象、物化、讽刺和厌女等线索。对于视频，研究了特征选择、基于帧的视觉表示、OCR文本特征、声学描述符和传感器元数据的影响。结果表明，聚焦的LLM语义线索改进了模因性别歧视识别，而视频性能对特征维度和跨模态噪声高度敏感。
papers.novelty: 针对多模态性别歧视任务，构建了特征工程后期融合流水线，特别引入LLM衍生语义指标，并系统对比了不同模态特征在模因与视频上的表现。
innovation_points: 结合梯度提升模型与层次化后处理的多模态融合框架
引入LLM衍生语义指标用于模因中的刻板印象、物化等线索检测
对视频任务系统评估了特征选择、OCR文本、声学等多维度特征
papers.limitations: 视频任务对特征维度敏感，且官方测试表明无过滤特征泛化更好，表明特征选择策略的局限性。
improvement_directions: 发展更鲁棒的跨模态特征选择方法以提升泛化性
加强视频中的时间建模能力
探索端到端的多模态融合架构以减少手工特征工程
papers.engineering_value: 为多模态性别歧视识别提供了可落地的特征工程方案，OCR文本特征在视频中有效，可用于类似有害内容检测系统。
papers.why_relevant: OCR被用于提取视频中的文本特征，是多模态性别歧视识别的重要组成部分。
